'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 2''' was the 2nd issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]'', covering [[June]] and [[July]] [[1996]] and containing 66 pages.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*[[Star Sightings|New Hopes]]
*Q&A
*[[Jawa's Corner|Jawas' Corner]]
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]

===Features===
*"[[Life After Leia: Carrie Fisher Now Wages Battles with Pen Instead of Lightsaber|Life After Leia]]" {{C|from [[Star Wars Insider 23|''Star Wars Insider'' 23]]}}
*[[The Making of Star Wars (feature)|The Making of ''Star Wars'']]: "[[Still Designing A Galaxy Far, Far Away: A Profile of "Artiste Extraordinaire" Ralph McQuarrie|Designing the ''Star Wars'' Galaxy]]" {{C|from [[Star Wars Insider 24|''Star Wars Insider'' 24]]}}
*''[[Boba Fett: Bounty on Bar-Kooda]]'' Part 2
*:<small>Part Two of Three. [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] recruits an unwilling aide to his hunt for the pirate, [[Bar-Kooda]].</small>
*"Tom Bertino Unmasked" {{C|by [[Dave Bassom]]}}
*:<small>[[Dave Bassom|David Bassom]] talks to ILM animation wizard Tom Bertino about his eye-popping, jaw-dropping work on [[Wikipedia:The Mask (film)|The Mask]] and the spectacular spectres in [[Wikipedia:Casper (film)|Casper]]…</small>
